Class SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.aggregation.SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder
Enclosing class:
SetWindowFieldsOperation
public static class SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder extends Object
Builder API for a SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindow.
Since:
3.3
Author:
Christoph Strobl

    SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder
    from(Number lower)
    The lower (inclusive) range limit value to add to the value based on the sortBy field.
    SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder

    The lower (inclusive) range limit based on the sortBy field.
    SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder

    Use current as lower limit.

    Use unbounded as lower limit.

    The upper (inclusive) range limit value to add to the value based on the sortBy field.

    The upper (inclusive) range limit based on the sortBy field.

    Use current as upper limit.
    SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder

    Use unbounded as upper limit.

  • Constructor Details

    • RangeWindowBuilder

      public RangeWindowBuilder()

  • Method Details

    • from

      @Contract("_ -> this") public SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder from(String lower)
      The lower (inclusive) range limit based on the sortBy field.
      Parameters:
      lower - eg. current or unbounded.
      Returns:
      this.

    • to

      @Contract("_ -> this") public SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder to(String upper)
      The upper (inclusive) range limit based on the sortBy field.
      Parameters:
      upper - eg. current or unbounded.
      Returns:
      this.

    • from

      @Contract("_ -> this") public SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder from(Number lower)
      The lower (inclusive) range limit value to add to the value based on the sortBy field. Use a negative integer for a position before the current document. Use a positive integer for a position after the current document. 0 is the current document position.
      Parameters:
      lower -
      Returns:
      this.

    • to

      @Contract("_ -> this") public SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder to(Number upper)
      The upper (inclusive) range limit value to add to the value based on the sortBy field. Use a negative integer for a position before the current document. Use a positive integer for a position after the current document. 0 is the current document position.
      Parameters:
      upper -
      Returns:
      this.

    • fromCurrent

      @Contract("-> this") public SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder fromCurrent()
      Use current as lower limit.
      Returns:
      this.

    • fromUnbounded

      @Contract("-> this") public SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder fromUnbounded()
      Use unbounded as lower limit.
      Returns:
      this.

    • toCurrent

      @Contract("-> this") public SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder toCurrent()
      Use current as upper limit.
      Returns:
      this.

    • toUnbounded

      @Contract("-> this") public SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder toUnbounded()
      Use unbounded as upper limit.
      Returns:
      this.

    • unit

      @Contract("_ -> this") public SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindowBuilder unit(SetWindowFieldsOperation.WindowUnit windowUnit)
      Set the unit or measure for the given SetWindowFieldsOperation.Window.
      Parameters:
      windowUnit - must not be null. Can be on of SetWindowFieldsOperation.Windows.
      Returns:
      this.

    • build

      @Contract("-> new") public SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindow build()
      Build the SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindow.
      Returns:
      new instance of SetWindowFieldsOperation.RangeWindow.
